title: Bowlbug (Rock)
move_pattern: Repeats Headbutt. When stunned (off balance), performs Dizzy on the next turn to recover and stun the player.
notes: The monster's behavior is tied to its 'off balance' state. While off balance (typically from stuns), it will perform Dizzy instead of Headbutt. Dizzy both applies a stun to the player and allows the monster to recover from its off balance status.
